root.rep_text: รายงาน หุ้น-หนี้ คงเหลือ รายตัว
root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, tm.* from ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, nvl(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock,0) as share_stock, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'01',sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,0)),0) as loan_01, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'02',sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,0)),0) as loan_02, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'03',sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,0)),0) as loan_03, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'01',1,0)),0) as count_01, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'02',1,0)),0) as count_02, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'03',1,0)),0) as count_03 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered,sc_mem_m_share_mem,sc_lon_m_loan_card,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock union all select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock,0,0,0,0,0,0 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 and not exists(select null from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ) tm ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tm.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and (tm.share_stock > 0 or tm.loan_01 > 0 or tm.loan_02 > 0 or tm.loan_03 > 0) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_share_loan_balance_2group_no_nest_.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type||'/'||nvl((select loan_code_desc from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code where loan_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code and loan_code != '0'),'ปกติ') as loan_code , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, (case when principal_balance > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as have_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {1} /*01-ฉุกเฉิน ,02-สามัญ ,03-พิเศษ*/ and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no

select tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code , sum(tm.principal_balance) as principal_balance, sum(tm.have_loan) as have_loan, count(distinct tm.membership_no ) as membership_no from ( select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type||'/'||nvl((select loan_code_desc from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code where loan_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code and loan_code != '0'),'ปกติ') as loan_code , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, (case when principal_balance > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as have_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {0} /*01-ฉุกเฉิน ,02-สามัญ ,03-พิเศษ*/ and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '!member_group_no_1!' and '!member_group_no_2!' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ) tm group by tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code order by tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code
